chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2163 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution. 21.03.2025 Mr. Rashid Mahmood, advocate for the petitioner. Petition is pending since 2023 and remains listed for orders as to non-prosecution. Office objections have not been addressed till date and no justification has been provided by the learned counsel. Memorandum of petition has been perused and only prayer clause is that the petitioner seeks enforcement of insurance claim against the insurance company. Prima facie, such claim is not sustainable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. In view hereof, petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
